page_label: Drill: collab session removed without notice on seat-loss (beta)

local_work_survival.survival_summary: Account-free local lane: no managed identity; all local-core capabilities are permanently available without any exit event.

org_affordance.affordance_summary: Account-free local lane: no org-scoped affordances are present; removal notice is not applicable.

rows.plain_language_summary: Row 'auth:deprovision_preserves:account_free_local_no_managed_exit:connected': exit event 'account_free_local_no_managed_exit' under profile 'connected'.
